title: Configure S3 bucket versioning
outcome: Bucket versioning is enabled and object history is retained.
facts: Existing objects are not duplicated when enabling versioning
concepts: Versioning enables rollback of overwritten/deleted objects

steps.text: Open the target S3 bucket properties
Set versioning state to Enabled
Verify object upload creates version IDs
steps.completion: Uploaded object shows non-null version ID

title: Apply S3 lifecycle rule for log archive
outcome: Objects transition to archive storage by lifecycle policy.
concepts: Lifecycle reduces storage cost over time

steps.text: Create lifecycle rule scoped to log prefix
steps.completion: Lifecycle rule appears in bucket configuration

steps.text: Set transition to archive class at target age
steps.completion: Transition action is configured with correct day threshold

steps.text: Validate rule status is enabled

title: Enable default encryption on S3 bucket
outcome: New objects are encrypted by default in the bucket.
facts: Default encryption applies to future uploads
concepts: Default encryption reduces accidental plaintext storage
dependencies: KMS key permissions if SSE-KMS used

steps.text: Open bucket default encryption settings
Select encryption mode and key
steps.completion: Default encryption mode and key are saved

steps.text: Upload test object and confirm encryption metadata

title: Create IAM role for EC2 workload
outcome: EC2-assumable IAM role exists with required permissions.
concepts: Roles avoid long-lived credentials on instances

steps.text: Create role with EC2 trust relationship
steps.completion: Role trust policy includes ec2.amazonaws.com principal

steps.text: Attach least-privilege permission policy
Confirm role can be attached to an instance profile
steps.completion: Role is selectable in instance profile workflow

title: Rotate IAM access key for service account
outcome: Old key is retired and new key is active without service outage.
facts: IAM users may have up to two active keys
concepts: Dual-key window enables safe cutover

steps.text: Create second access key for target IAM user
steps.completion: New key ID is visible and recorded securely

steps.text: Update dependent service secrets with new key
steps.completion: Dependent services authenticate successfully with new key

steps.text: Disable and delete old access key
steps.completion: Old key no longer appears as active

title: Enable CloudTrail multi-region logging
outcome: API activity is recorded across all regions.
concepts: Global logging improves forensic coverage

steps.text: Create or update trail to multi-region mode
Set validated S3 destination
Verify recent management events are logged
steps.completion: CloudTrail event history shows new entries

title: Create VPC flow logs to CloudWatch
outcome: Flow logs are emitted for selected VPC resources.
facts: Flow logs can target VPC, subnet, or ENI
concepts: Flow logs support traffic analysis and incident response
dependencies: IAM role for flow logs exists

steps.text: Enable flow logs on target VPC
Set CloudWatch log group destination
steps.completion: Destination points to expected log group

steps.text: Confirm log stream receives records
steps.completion: Recent flow log entries are visible in CloudWatch

title: Enable GuardDuty in account
outcome: GuardDuty detector is active for threat detection.
facts: GuardDuty analyzes CloudTrail, VPC DNS, and flow telemetry
concepts: Managed detection complements preventive controls

steps.text: Create GuardDuty detector
Enable desired data sources
Validate findings can be queried
steps.completion: Findings page loads without permission errors

title: Configure Security Hub standards
outcome: Selected compliance standards are enabled and evaluated.
facts: Standards controls may produce initial large finding volume
concepts: Standards provide baseline control visibility

steps.text: Enable required Security Hub standards
Confirm control checks are running
Review finding severities for baseline

title: Create CloudWatch alarm for EC2 CPU
outcome: Alarm triggers when instance CPU breaches threshold.
concepts: Threshold alarms support early saturation detection

steps.text: Create alarm on CPUUtilization metric
Set threshold and evaluation periods
Validate alarm transitions with test load
steps.completion: Alarm enters ALARM state under sustained load

title: Enable detailed monitoring for EC2 instance
outcome: Instance emits 1-minute CloudWatch metrics.
concepts: Higher resolution improves alert responsiveness

steps.text: Enable detailed monitoring on target instance
Wait for 1-minute datapoints
Confirm dashboard panel refreshes at higher granularity

title: Attach EBS volume to EC2 instance
outcome: Volume is attached and visible to the OS.
facts: Volume and instance must be in same AZ
OS-level mount is separate from attachment
concepts: Attachment exposes block device to guest OS
dependencies: EC2 instance running in same AZ

steps.text: Attach volume to target instance with device name
Verify device presence in operating system
steps.completion: New block device appears in OS inventory

steps.text: Record mapping for mount configuration

title: Create encrypted EBS snapshot
outcome: Encrypted snapshot exists for target volume.
concepts: Snapshots support backup and recovery operations

steps.text: Initiate snapshot creation for source volume
Ensure encryption is enabled with expected key
steps.completion: Snapshot metadata shows encrypted=true and correct KMS key

steps.text: Tag snapshot for retention policy

title: Create RDS automated backup retention policy
outcome: RDS instance retains automated backups per policy.
concepts: Backup retention balances recoverability and cost

steps.text: Set backup retention period on RDS instance
steps.completion: Instance config shows expected retention days

steps.text: Confirm preferred backup window
Verify automated backup artifact appears

title: Enable RDS Performance Insights
outcome: Performance Insights is enabled for database workload analysis.
facts: Performance Insights stores query and load diagnostics
concepts: Database bottlenecks require workload-level visibility

steps.text: Enable Performance Insights on RDS instance
Set retention period for insights data
Open Performance Insights dashboard

title: Configure ALB access logs to S3
outcome: Application Load Balancer writes access logs to S3.
facts: Bucket policy must allow ELB log delivery
concepts: Access logs enable request-level observability

steps.text: Enable ALB access logging
steps.completion: ALB attributes show access logs enabled

steps.text: Set destination bucket and prefix
Verify log object delivery
steps.completion: New ALB log file appears in S3 prefix

title: Create Route53 weighted record
outcome: Weighted DNS record routes traffic by configured weights.
facts: Weighted routing requires multiple records with same name/type
concepts: Weighted records support controlled traffic shifting

steps.text: Create weighted records for each endpoint
steps.completion: Records with matching name/type and weights exist

steps.text: Set health checks if required
Validate DNS answers reflect weight distribution
steps.completion: Repeated queries show expected answer mix

title: Configure AWS Backup plan for EBS resources
outcome: Backup plan schedules and retains EBS backups automatically.
facts: Backup plans use resource selection by tags or explicit assignment
concepts: Centralized backup policy reduces per-service drift

steps.text: Create backup plan with schedule and retention
steps.completion: Backup plan appears with expected rules

steps.text: Assign resources using tags
steps.completion: Resource assignment shows target EBS volumes

steps.text: Confirm backup job execution
steps.completion: Completed backup job appears in AWS Backup

title: Enable ECR image scanning on push
outcome: New container images are scanned automatically after push.
facts: Scan results depend on vulnerability database freshness
concepts: Early image scanning reduces deployment risk

steps.text: Enable scan-on-push in repository settings
Push test image tag
Verify scan findings are generated
steps.completion: Scan results are visible for the pushed image

title: Create EventBridge rule for failed backup jobs
outcome: Failed backup jobs emit actionable event notifications.
concepts: Event-driven alerts reduce detection latency

steps.text: Create EventBridge rule matching backup failure events
steps.completion: Rule is enabled with expected event pattern

steps.text: Attach SNS or queue target
Validate with test event or real failure

title: Enable Config recorder and delivery channel
outcome: AWS Config continuously records resource configuration changes.
facts: Config requires recorder plus delivery channel
concepts: Config supports compliance and change traceability
dependencies: S3 bucket exists for Config delivery

steps.text: Create or verify Config delivery channel
steps.completion: Delivery channel targets expected S3 bucket

steps.text: Enable Config recorder
Confirm configuration items are arriving

title: Configure CloudFront origin access control
outcome: CloudFront accesses S3 origin privately using origin access control.
facts: Public bucket access is not required with OAC
concepts: Private origin access reduces data exposure

steps.text: Create origin access control
Attach OAC to S3 origin in distribution
Update bucket policy for CloudFront principal
steps.completion: Bucket policy allows CloudFront signed origin requests

title: Enable EKS control plane logging
outcome: Selected EKS control plane logs are sent to CloudWatch.
facts: Logging types include API, audit, authenticator, controller, scheduler
concepts: Control plane logs are essential for cluster forensics

steps.text: Enable required control plane log types
steps.completion: Cluster logging configuration shows selected types enabled

steps.text: Verify CloudWatch log groups are created
Confirm recent log ingestion
steps.completion: Log streams show current timestamped entries

title: Configure SQS dead-letter queue redrive policy
outcome: Failed messages are routed to dead-letter queue after retry threshold.
concepts: DLQs isolate poison messages for controlled handling

steps.text: Associate dead-letter queue with source queue
steps.completion: Redrive policy is present on source queue

steps.text: Set maxReceiveCount threshold
Validate failed message appears in DLQ
steps.completion: Test poison message is visible in DLQ

title: Enable SNS delivery status logging
outcome: SNS delivery outcomes are logged for endpoint troubleshooting.
concepts: Delivery logs reduce blind spots in notification pipelines

steps.text: Enable delivery status logging on SNS topic
Publish test notification
Verify delivery log entries in CloudWatch
steps.completion: Delivery success/failure entries appear in log group

title: Apply SCP deny for root account usage
outcome: Organization policy prevents prohibited root account actions.
concepts: Guardrail policies reduce blast radius of privileged misuse

steps.text: Create SCP policy document for root action deny
steps.completion: SCP policy is created with required statements

steps.text: Attach SCP to target OU or account
steps.completion: Policy attachment is visible on target

steps.text: Validate denied action is blocked
steps.completion: Simulated or real denied action returns explicit authorization failure
